title: Port Elizabeth, Eastern Cape — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Port Elizabeth, Eastern Cape: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Port Elizabeth is a city in Eastern Cape with a population of 1,263,000. The Friendly City on Algoa Bay, known for its beaches, automotive industry, and outdoor adventure opportunities.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
